name: Netflix
description: American subscription video on-demand streaming service and producer of original films and series.

years.notes: Curved 'Netflix' wordmark with red rectangle background and arched baseline. Used from 20 August 2001 to 12 June 2014. Wordmark scaled to fit 24×24 viewBox; mono variant renders the rectangle silhouette with letters cut out via even-odd fill.
Flat 'NETFLIX' wordmark by Gretel — removed the arched baseline and shadow, introduced June 2014 and still the primary logo. Wordmark vertically centered inside 24×24 viewBox.

Three-dimensional red 'N' ribbon symbol, introduced June 2016 as a compact app icon and brand mark for streaming surfaces. Two side panels carry linear gradients reproducing the ribbon's volumetric shading; mono variant flattens to a single 'N' silhouette.
